introSection: Sahara Twist (Traditional Chinese: жІҷжј йўЁжҡҙ) is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Leofoo Village Theme Park in Guanxi, Hsinchu, Taiwan.
fullText: Sahara Twist (Traditional Chinese: жІҷжј йўЁжҡҙ) is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Leofoo Village Theme Park in Guanxi, Hsinchu, Taiwan.
